projectDescription: An open-source framework and CLI toolchain for developing, testing, and maintaining official Datadog Agent integrations (Checks).
keyFeatures: AgentCheck base class providing a unified API for submitting metrics, events, service checks, and logs to Datadog
HTTP wrapper with automatic TLS, auth, and proxy configuration parsed from YAML config
OpenMetrics/Prometheus scraping framework (v2) for collecting CNCF-format metrics
Database query framework with connection pooling and query execution helpers
ddev CLI for running tests, managing E2E environments, validating configs, and releasing integrations
Configuration model code generation from spec.yaml files
pytest plugin and test stubs (AggregatorStub, DatadogAgentStub) for unit and integration testing
End-to-end testing against live Datadog Agent in Docker via ddev env commands
400+ official integrations covering databases, cloud platforms, networking, security, and observability tools
Changelog management tooling integrated with semantic versioning and CI
publicApiSurface: AgentCheck.gauge(name, value, tags, hostname, device_name, raw)
AgentCheck.count(name, value, tags, hostname, device_name, raw)
AgentCheck.monotonic_count(name, value, tags, hostname, device_name, raw)
AgentCheck.rate(name, value, tags, hostname, device_name, raw)
AgentCheck.histogram(name, value, tags, hostname, device_name, raw)
AgentCheck.historate(name, value, tags, hostname, device_name, raw)
AgentCheck.service_check(name, status, tags, hostname, message, raw)
